mechanism_narrative: Stronger month-over-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and higher near-term revenue expectations, so higher RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot RSAFS vintage value 705180 for 2024-04-01
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses into a restrictive zone, equity discount rates rise faster than near-term earnings estimates adjust, causing lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot FEDFUNDS vintage value 5.33 for 2024-04-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot UNRATE vintage value 3.9 for 2024-04-01
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after the unemployment trigger are not lower than non-trigger periods, or if the trigger has a positive hit rate above the unconditional baseline.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with accelerating consumer prices indicate that monetary policy remains restrictive without clear inflation relief, pressuring valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is above 4.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month growth is rising
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot CPIAUCSL vintage value 313.207 and FEDFUNDS 5.33
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-rate and rising-inflation state does not underperform single-variable signals, or if triggered 20-day returns exceed the unconditional mean in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Falling housing starts while payroll employment remains strong signals that interest-sensitive demand is weakening before labor data turns, foreshadowing earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% year over year while PAYEMS is still rising over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot HOUST vintage value 1321 and PAYEMS vintage value 158286
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with rate-sensitive demand weakness
failure_condition: Reject if this housing-labor divergence is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of triggered cases or does not underperform periods without the divergence.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, so stronger INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot INDPRO vintage value 102.6577 for 2024-03-01
failure_condition: Reject if higher 6-month INDPRO momentum has no positive relation to 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if its rolling 3-year Rank IC is negative in a majority of windows.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation decelerates under a high funds rate and unemployment stays low, markets price a soft landing and future easing, raising equity multiples and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation falls for 2 consecutive months while FEDFUNDS is at least 5.0% and UNRATE is at or below 4.0%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered soft-landing states do not produce higher 20-day returns than other high-FEDFUNDS states, or if the positive hit rate is below the unconditional hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp slowdown in real GDP growth signals broad demand deterioration and weaker earnings breadth, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days after the slowdown is visible.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized quarterly growth crosses below 0.5%
evidence_refs: fact:2024-05-15 snapshot GDPC1 vintage value 22768.866 for 2024-01-01
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 slowdown triggers are not followed by below-average 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if drawdown frequency after triggers is not higher than in non-trigger periods.
